ALL FOUR CASES ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES AND THE LEAD CASE IS 554309. ALL FURTHER FILINGS MUST BE IN THE LEAD CASE ONLY. DEFENDANTS DO NOT OPPOSE CONSOLIDATION OF ALL FOUR CASES. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR SINGLE ASSIGNMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO MAKING THAT REQUEST BY MOTION TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 206. TRIAL DATE IS DECEMBER 11, 2017. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Vacated

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-550354, CGC-16-554304, CGC-16-554309 WITH CASE CGC-16-550351
Off Calendar May-23-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. AMY L. SILVERSTEIN, TEL. NO. 1-415-593-7502 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. THOMAS L. LAKRITZ, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-554-3963 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING -THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS KPH MANAGEMENT LLC, and ENGAGE HOSPITALITY LLC's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-550354, CGC-16-554304, CGC-16-554309 WITH CASE CGC-16-550351 - Plaintiffs' motion to consolidate this case with three other cases (case numbers 554304, 554309 and 550354) is granted. All four cases are consolidated for all purposes and the lead case is 554309. All further filings must be in the lead case only. Defendants do not oppose consolidation of all four cases. Plaintiffs' request to vacate all trial dates and to set a new trial date with all discovery deadlines to be triggered off the new trial date is granted. Defendants' request for single assignment is denied without prejudice to making that request by motion to be heard in Department 206. Trial date is December 11, 2017. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(302/HK)

Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorneys, Amy Silverstein and Eddie Beeby of Silverstein & Pomerantz (415-593-3502) appear as counsels for plaintiff/opposing party

Deputy City Attorney, Frederick P. Sheinfield of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (415-554-3872) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Plaintiffs allege sufficient facts to support both claims and both claims are legally cognizable. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
